old_example: Fresh asparagus is a delicious and healthy vegetable that can be steamed, grilled, or roasted.
new_example: Fresh asparagus is a delicious vegetable that can be steamed or grilled.
new_translation: Măng tây tươi là một loại rau ngon có thể hấp hoặc nướng.

old_example: We must consider every aspect of the international expansion plan before making a final decision.
new_example: We must consider every aspect of the expansion plan before deciding.
new_translation: Chúng ta phải xem xét mọi khía cạnh của kế hoạch mở rộng trước khi quyết định.

old_example: The research project explores several different aspects of global climate change and its impact.
new_example: The project explores different aspects of global climate change.
new_translation: Dự án nghiên cứu khám phá các khía cạnh khác nhau của biến đổi khí hậu.

old_example: The workshop is designed to provide practical advice for aspiring international writers and journalists.
new_example: The workshop provides practical advice for aspiring writers and journalists.
new_translation: Hội thảo đưa ra lời khuyên thực tế cho các nhà văn và nhà báo.

old_example: The opposition party continues to assail the government's new economic policies in the national newspapers.
new_example: The opposition continues to assail the government's new economic policies.
new_translation: Đảng đối lập tiếp tục tấn công các chính sách kinh tế mới của chính phủ.

old_example: The police managed to capture the assailant shortly after the attack took place yesterday afternoon.
new_example: The police captured the assailant shortly after the attack yesterday.
new_translation: Cảnh sát đã bắt giữ kẻ tấn công ngay sau vụ việc hôm qua.

old_example: The manager continued to assert that the technical failure was not due to human error.
new_example: The manager asserted that the failure was not due to human error.
new_translation: Quản lý khẳng định rằng lỗi này không phải do sai sót con người.

old_example: The expert's assertion regarding the market's future growth was supported by recent economic data.
new_example: The expert's assertion was supported by recent economic data.
new_translation: Khẳng định của chuyên gia được hỗ trợ bởi dữ liệu kinh tế gần đây.

old_example: The property was assessed at several million dollars by an independent international real estate expert.
new_example: The property was assessed at several million dollars by an expert.
new_translation: Tài sản được thẩm định giá ở mức vài triệu đô la bởi một chuyên gia.

old_example: The committee is currently assessing the potential environmental impact of the new international project.
new_example: The committee is currently assessing the potential environmental impact.
new_translation: Ủy ban hiện đang đánh giá tác động môi trường tiềm năng.

old_example: The bank performed a thorough financial assessment before approving the loan for the international expansion.
new_example: The bank performed a financial assessment before approving the loan.
new_translation: Ngân hàng đã thực hiện đánh giá tài chính trước khi phê duyệt khoản vay.

old_example: The department conducts regular performance assessments for all employees to identify areas for improvement.
new_example: The department conducts regular performance assessments for all employees.
new_translation: Bộ phận thực hiện đánh giá năng lực thường xuyên cho mọi nhân viên.

old_example: Her extensive international work experience is a valuable asset to our global marketing team.
new_example: Her extensive work experience is a valuable asset to our team.
new_translation: Kinh nghiệm làm việc sâu rộng của cô ấy là tài sản quý báu cho nhóm.

old_example: The company's total assets have grown significantly since it expanded into the international market.
new_example: The company's total assets have grown significantly since its expansion.
new_translation: Tổng tài sản của công ty đã tăng đáng kể từ khi mở rộng.

old_example: The legal team worked assiduously to review every clause in the contract before the final signing ceremony.
new_example: The legal team worked assiduously to review every clause in the contract.
new_translation: Đội ngũ pháp lý đã làm việc cần mẫn để xem xét mọi điều khoản.

old_example: The manager decided to assign the new project to the international development team yesterday.
new_example: The manager decided to assign the new project to the team yesterday.
new_translation: Quản lý đã quyết định giao dự án mới cho đội vào hôm qua.

old_example: Assigning tasks fairly among team members is essential for maintaining a positive working environment.
new_example: Assigning tasks fairly is essential for a positive working environment.
new_translation: Việc giao nhiệm vụ công bằng là thiết yếu cho môi trường làm việc tốt.

old_example: Please complete the international marketing assignment and submit it to the manager by Friday.
new_example: Please complete the marketing assignment and submit it by Friday.
new_translation: Vui lòng hoàn thành bài tập tiếp thị và nộp trước thứ Sáu.

old_example: The employees were given several different assignments to complete during the international training program.
new_example: Employees were given several assignments during the training program.
new_translation: Các nhân viên được giao vài nhiệm vụ trong chương trình đào tạo.

old_example: It takes time for new international students to assimilate into the local culture and community.
new_example: It takes time for students to assimilate into the local culture.
new_translation: Phải mất thời gian để sinh viên hòa nhập vào văn hóa địa phương.

old_example: If you require any assistance with your international travel plans, please contact our department.
new_example: If you require assistance with travel plans, please contact our department.
new_translation: Nếu bạn cần trợ giúp về kế hoạch du lịch, vui lòng liên hệ bộ phận.

old_example: The manager and her personal assistant will attend the international technology summit next week.
new_example: The manager and her assistant will attend the summit next week.
new_translation: Quản lý và trợ lý của bà sẽ tham dự hội nghị vào tuần tới.

old_example: A team of administrative assistants is responsible for coordinating the CEO's international travel schedule.
new_example: Administrative assistants are responsible for coordinating the CEO's travel schedule.
new_translation: Các trợ lý hành chính chịu trách nhiệm điều phối lịch trình của CEO.

old_example: The research team was assisted by several international experts in the field of computer science.
new_example: The research team was assisted by several experts in computer science.
new_translation: Nhóm nghiên cứu đã được hỗ trợ bởi một vài chuyên gia khoa học máy tính.

old_example: The marketing department is currently assisting the sales team with the international product launch.
new_example: The department is assisting the sales team with the product launch.
new_translation: Bộ phận đang hỗ trợ đội bán hàng trong việc ra mắt sản phẩm.

old_example: The new software tool assists international researchers in analyzing large sets of complex data.
new_example: The new software tool assists researchers in analyzing complex data.
new_translation: Công cụ phần mềm mới hỗ trợ các nhà nghiên cứu phân tích dữ liệu phức tạp.

old_example: The company decided to associate with several international partners to expand its distribution network.
new_example: The company decided to associate with several partners to expand its network.
new_translation: Công ty đã quyết định liên kết với vài đối tác để mở rộng mạng lưới.

old_example: She was recently promoted to the position of associate director in the international marketing department.
new_example: She was recently promoted to associate director in the marketing department.
new_translation: Cô ấy mới được thăng chức lên phó giám đốc trong bộ phận tiếp thị.

old_example: The high costs associated with international shipping have forced us to increase our prices.
new_example: High costs associated with international shipping forced us to increase prices.
new_translation: Chi phí cao liên quan đến vận chuyển quốc tế buộc chúng tôi tăng giá.

old_example: Mr. Smith and his business associates are planning an international expansion project for next year.
new_example: Mr. Smith and his associates are planning an expansion project next year.
new_translation: Ông Smith và các cộng sự đang lập kế hoạch mở rộng vào năm tới.

old_example: The local business association provides support and resources for small companies in the region.
new_example: The business association provides support and resources for small companies.
new_translation: Hiệp hội doanh nghiệp cung cấp hỗ trợ và nguồn lực cho các công ty nhỏ.

old_example: The marketing campaign explores the positive associations that consumers have with our luxury brand.
new_example: The campaign explores the positive associations consumers have with our brand.
new_translation: Chiến dịch khám phá những sự liên tưởng tích cực của người dùng với thương hiệu.

old_example: We cannot assume that the international market will continue to grow at the current rate.
new_example: We cannot assume that the market will continue to grow.
new_translation: Chúng ta không thể giả định rằng thị trường sẽ tiếp tục tăng trưởng.

old_example: He assumed the role of CEO after the former director retired unexpectedly last month.
new_example: He assumed the role of CEO after the director retired unexpectedly.
new_translation: Anh ấy đảm nhận vai trò CEO sau khi giám đốc nghỉ hưu đột ngột.

old_example: The new manager assumes responsibility for overseeing all international operations starting from next Monday.
new_example: The new manager assumes responsibility for overseeing all international operations.
new_translation: Quản lý mới đảm nhận trách nhiệm giám sát mọi hoạt động quốc tế.

old_example: Assuming that the economy continues to recover, we can expect a significant increase in sales.
new_example: Assuming that the economy recovers, we can expect increased sales.
new_translation: Giả định rằng nền kinh tế phục hồi, chúng ta có thể kỳ vọng doanh số tăng.

old_example: The manager's decision was based on the assumption that international market conditions would remain stable this year.
new_example: The decision was based on the assumption that market conditions remain stable.
new_translation: Quyết định dựa trên giả định rằng điều kiện thị trường sẽ ổn định.

old_example: The financial forecast was based on several optimistic assumptions about future international market trends.
new_example: The forecast was based on several optimistic assumptions about market trends.
new_translation: Dự báo dựa trên một vài giả định lạc quan về xu hướng thị trường.

old_example: The CEO provided his personal assurance that the company would meet its international sales targets this quarter.
new_example: The CEO provided assurance that the company would meet its targets.
new_translation: CEO đã đưa ra sự đảm bảo rằng công ty sẽ đạt được các mục tiêu.

old_example: I can assure you that all our international products meet the highest safety requirements.
new_example: I can assure you that our products meet all safety requirements.
new_translation: Tôi có thể cam đoan rằng sản phẩm của chúng tôi đáp ứng yêu cầu an toàn.

old_example: The manager assured the team that their hard work would be recognized during the annual performance review.
new_example: The manager assured the team that their work would be recognized.
new_translation: Quản lý cam đoan rằng sự chăm chỉ của nhóm sẽ được ghi nhận.

old_example: The new international marketing campaign will assuredly lead to a significant increase in brand awareness.
new_example: The new marketing campaign will assuredly lead to increased brand awareness.
new_translation: Chiến dịch tiếp thị mới chắc chắn sẽ giúp tăng nhận diện thương hiệu.

old_example: It is astonishing how much the technology has changed in just a few years.
new_example: It is astonishing how much technology has changed in a few years.
new_translation: Thật đáng ngạc nhiên khi công nghệ đã thay đổi nhiều trong vài năm.

old_example: The young girl dreamed of becoming an astronaut and being the first person to explore Mars.
new_example: The young girl dreamed of becoming an astronaut and exploring Mars.
new_translation: Cô gái trẻ từng mơ ước trở thành phi hành gia và khám phá sao Hỏa.

old_example: She decided to study astronomy at university because of her interest in space exploration and modern science.
new_example: She decided to study astronomy because of her interest in space exploration.
new_translation: Cô ấy quyết định học thiên văn học vì sự quan tâm đến không gian.

old_example: We ate a delicious traditional dinner at a local restaurant after the conference ended.
new_example: We ate a delicious dinner at a local restaurant after the conference.
new_translation: Chúng tôi đã ăn một bữa tối ngon tại nhà hàng sau khi hội nghị kết thúc.

old_example: The university offers several scholarships for students who excel in international athletics and sports.
new_example: The university offers scholarships for students who excel in athletics.
new_translation: Trường đại học cung cấp học bổng cho sinh viên xuất sắc trong điền kinh.

old_example: The restaurant is famous for its cozy and romantic atmosphere, making it popular for dates.
new_example: The restaurant is famous for its cozy and romantic atmosphere.
new_translation: Nhà hàng nổi tiếng với bầu không khí ấm cúng và lãng mạn.

old_example: The company's new regional headquarters features a grand glass atrium that allows plenty of natural light inside.
new_example: The new headquarters features a glass atrium with plenty of light.
new_translation: Trụ sở mới có một giếng trời bằng kính với nhiều ánh sáng.

old_example: Please ensure that all the necessary attachments are included with your job application form.
new_example: Please ensure that all necessary attachments are included with your application.
new_translation: Vui lòng đảm bảo rằng các tệp đính kèm được bao gồm trong đơn ứng tuyển.
